The question is asking to determine the duration in years between the first and last year in the dataset. Since the column contains numerical year values, we need to sort the data using the f_sort_column(year) operation with the order "small to large" to identify the earliest and latest years, then calculate the difference between them.

The first year listed is 1926 and the last year listed before "totals" is 1939. To find the number of years between 1926 and 1939, we subtract the first year from the last year: 1939 - 1926 = 13 years.
